title: Thyroid and Fatigue After 40: Are Your Hormones Out of Balance?
tags: thyroid, fatigue, hormones, hypothyroidism, women over 40, energy
summary: A comprehensive guide to thyroid-related fatigue in women over 40, covering how thyroid hormones regulate cellular energy, why standard TSH tests can miss dysfunction, how perimenopause and cortisol worsen thyroid health, and how NAD+ and targeted nutrients support energy recovery.
featured_image_alt: Active woman over 40 exercising outdoors with energy and vitality
